name: ops-report-generator
description: Generate CCE weekly, monthly, SLA, capacity, and stability reports by consolidating outputs from daily inspection, capacity trend forecasting, availability risk scanning, cost optimization analysis, and optional on-call context.

tools.name: huawei_generate_ops_report
tools.description: Run huawei_generate_ops_report through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

region.description: Huawei Cloud region, for example cn-north-4.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.

sk.description: Secret Access Key. Prefer HUAWEI_SK environment variable.

project_id.description: Huawei Cloud project ID. Prefer HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID environment variable.
